# Claude Overlay

This file defines Claude-specific behavior on top of the shared base policy.

## Inherits

- `../base-policy.md`
- `../release-policy.md`

## Claude-Specific Guidance

- Prefer explicit architectural reasoning when proposing non-trivial refactors.
- For worktree-heavy tasks, follow isolated worktree conventions documented by the project.
- Keep review feedback pragmatic: prioritize critical risks over cosmetic changes.
